name: cashsnap_two_stage_oldoverlap_broad_realfrag_bg_reject_browser_stack
known_limits: Diagnostic stack for testing whether broad real-fragment background predictions can reject prop false positives without denomination disagreement rejection.
Runs NMS before class rejection so rejected high-confidence background boxes can suppress lower-confidence duplicate proposals.
Broad denomination predictions are not reliable on synthetic positives; this stack uses the classifier only as a background gate and keeps detector denominations for accepted proposals.
Requires browser mined-real and synthetic stress proof before any default-stack use.
